title: US Military Using Acupuncture to Reduce Stress and Pain
creator: Integrative Health Partners
excerpt: Did you know that the U.S. military is using acupuncture on the battle field to reduce stress and pain in injured soldiers? A special type of acupuncture protocol called battlefield acupuncture is being taught to soldiers as part of their emergency medical training. Military officials like the fact that acupuncture brings relief and reduces the […]
content: Read the story from NPR for more information.
